title: fragaria rupestris
intro: Fragaria rupestris, also known as the alpine strawberry or alpine strawberry plant, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fragaria rupestris include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular choice for natural remedies.
